regional_cost_note: Security system installers in Nelson typically charge $1,300–$3,000 for a basic alarm system, $1,600–$3,800 for a 4-camera CCTV setup, and $2,700–$6,500 for a full monitored system. Nelson/Tasman rates are broadly in line with the national average. Monthly monitoring costs ($25–$80/month) are separate — confirm the total cost of ownership before committing.
